---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an addition or change to Super Mod Checker
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap or limitation in the current plugin.

**Proposed solution**
What should the plugin do differently or additionally?

**Is this in scope?**
Confirm this relates to mod detection, the tablet UI, the HUD, or the log output. Out-of-scope requests (e.g. cheat features, bypassing detection) will be closed.

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or references.
